message:
feat(orphan_reaper): Cx-first run_orphan_reaper_with_cx entry point (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Adds `run_orphan_reaper_with_cx` behind the asupersync-runtime feature,
extending the Cx-first migration pattern to the top-level watch-daemon
subtask that scans for stuck `wezterm cli` orphan processes and reaps
them past a configured max age.

Scope:

1. crates/frankenterm-core/src/orphan_reaper.rs (+105, additions only)

   Adds `run_orphan_reaper_with_cx(cx, config, shutdown_flag)`. Behavior:

     * Pre-flight cancellation gate. If `cx.is_cancel_requested()` is
       true on entry, returns before the `interval == 0` check and
       before any sleep — an operator who has abandoned the watch
       daemon should not trigger a final orphan scan.

     * `interval == 0` (operator-disabled) still returns immediately,
       matching the legacy `run_orphan_reaper` contract.

     * Each inter-cycle sleep bound via
       `crate::runtime_compat::sleep_with_cx`. If the sleep returns
       Err (cancellation), the loop terminates cleanly without a
       spurious extra reap cycle.

     * Both `shutdown_flag` and `cx.is_cancel_requested()` checked
       after each sleep so either cancellation path terminates the
       loop at the next iteration gate.

   Legacy `run_orphan_reaper` preserved; strictly additive.

   Two new LabRuntime tests under `labruntime_orphan_reaper`:

     * `run_orphan_reaper_with_cx_pre_cancelled_exits_immediately`
       (seed 0x0_1FEA_BED5_0505): pre-cancels the Cx; asserts the
       shutdown flag stays untouched (short-circuit via Cx path, not
       shutdown path).

     * `run_orphan_reaper_with_cx_interval_zero_disables` (seed
       0x0_1FEA_BED5_0606): disables the reaper via interval=0;
       asserts the function returns immediately without touching the
       shutdown flag. Pins the disabled-contract behavior.

   Tests intentionally avoid exercising the actual reap cycle — that
   requires a real OS process table (`ps` subprocess) which is outside
   the scope of a deterministic LabRuntime test and already covered
   by the existing `parse_ps_line_if_reapable` unit tests.

Verification (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target):

  * cargo test -p frankenterm-core --lib orphan_reaper::: 22/22 pass
    (20 existing + 2 new LabRuntime)
  * cargo clippy -p frankenterm-core --lib -D warnings: clean
  * rustfmt --check: clean

Leaves ft-xbnl0.2.3 still in_progress. Session now has 6 Cx-first
slices landed: native_events, snapshot_engine, cpu_pressure,
memory_budget, memory_pressure, orphan_reaper.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
